MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Koorosh Afsari, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Jill Aquino, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Jon Berkley Management, Inc.
Jak Steven Marquez representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Robert Freeman is present.
Gary Williams representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed. This case settled, the trial date of September 4, 2007 is vacated.
